// THE ORIGIN

THE STORY OF ARMORY

As a long-time firearm collector and DIY enthusiast, I hit a wall. My collection had grown into a serious investment — but my tracking system was frozen in time. A half-finished Excel sheet that was tedious to maintain and offered zero peace of mind.

Every new addition brought inventory anxiety instead of excitement: manual data entry, missing specs, and one nagging question I couldn't shake.

I decided to build the tool I couldn't find. One that treated a collection like a high-tech vault rather than a grocery list. The goal was simple: bridge the gap between the physical object in my hand and a complete digital record in my pocket.

What began as a development project became a platform built on two principles: utility and privacy. AI to eliminate friction. A local-first architecture that never phones home.

"If something happened today, would my insurance paperwork actually be ready?"

⬡ THE QUESTION THAT SPARKED ARMORY

ARMORY turned a source of stress into a source of pride. Built by a hobbyist, for hobbyists — combining the technical rigor of a developer with the passion of a collector. Your vault deserves better than a spreadsheet.

// CAPABILITIES

BUILT FOR THE SERIOUS COLLECTOR

📸
ONE-SCAN INTAKE

Point your camera at any firearm or its markings. Groq AI identifies make, model, caliber, and technical specifications automatically — no typing required. The fastest way to build a professional vault from scratch.

⬡ AI POWERED
🤖
INTELLIGENCE LAYER

Groq AI generates deep-dive descriptions and manufacturer history, turning a serial number into a story worth reading.

FREE TO USE
📷
PHOTO GALLERY

Hero photo plus unlimited gallery per firearm with fullscreen lightbox viewer. Document every detail.

🗄
TACTICAL LOGISTICS

Storage locations, round counts, purchase dates, maintenance logs — every operational detail in one place.

📄
INSURANCE EXPORTS

One-tap professional PDF reports for single firearms or your entire vault. Print-ready in seconds when you need them most.

🔒
PRIVACY FIRST

No accounts. No cloud. No snooping. Your data and API keys never leave your device. Full JSON backups for total sovereignty.

⬡ LOCAL ONLY
